text.title: AI Product Marketing Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when ai-product-marketing-patterns is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Launch copy claims '99% accuracy' without naming the test set.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add eval + test-set reference; revise copy.

antipattern.description: Demo shows perfect output; prospect tries their data; result is poor.
antipattern.note: Fix: Anchor demo to a published spec; show both pass and fail cases.

antipattern.description: Pricing page says 'starts at $99'; actual cost varies 10× by usage.
antipattern.note: Fix: Publish unit pricing + usage calculator.
